title: Operations Executive (Inventory/ Warehouse) )
description:
Job Summary

The role is responsible for managing warehouse operations and inventory, preparing locks and spare parts, and coordinating replacement parts for suppliers. The position also supports installation activities and responds to customer and reseller requirements to ensure smooth operational delivery.

Responsibilities

1. Inventory Management

  • Monitor and track stock levels of locks, spare parts, and demo units

  • Update the inventory system to reflect stock status (in stock, low stock, out of stock)

  • Ensure timely replenishment of low-stock items to prevent shortages

2. Warehouse Operations

  • Receive, unpack, and organize incoming supplier deliveries

  • Prepare demo stands and conduct basic functional testing of locks

  • Maintain a clean, organized, and accessible warehouse/storage area

3. Parts Replacement Collation (Supplier Orders)

  • Receive replacement requests from operations, customers, or resellers

  • Verify part numbers, quantities, and customer details for accuracy

  • Package replacement parts and prepare required supplier documentation

  • Submit replacement orders to suppliers and track shipment status

  • Maintain accurate logs of all replacement parts for auditing purposes

  • Escalate missing, incorrect, or unclear requests to management promptly

4. Installation & Operations Support

  • Prepare locks and spare parts for upcoming installations

  • Provide support to Ops teams for urgent installation or reseller issues when required

  • Assist with weekend or peak-season operations as needed

5. Reporting & Documentation

  • Maintain accurate inventory records, warehouse logs, and replacement part records

  • Provide weekly updates on stock levels, pending replacement orders, and completed tasks

  • Proactively identify and report potential bottlenecks or operational delays

Skills & Requirements

  • Highly organized and detail-oriented, with strong accuracy in parts collation

  • Comfortable handling physical inventory and small packaging tasks

  • Tech-savvy, with the ability to update inventory spreadsheets or management systems

  • Willing to support operational and installation-related tasks when required

  • Strong sense of responsibility and follow-through, understanding the importance of timely replacements for customer satisfaction

    The role is scheduled during standard office hours, with Sundays and one weekday off.

postedCompany.description: The Smart Series vision is to create a better everyday life through the use of smart home devices. We do this by offering a wide range of smart home products and excellent customer service through all forms of sales channels. The Smart Series takes pride in empowering our staff to make decisions on behalf of the company and provide them with a high level of independence.
